title: astragalus leucomallophorus
intro: Astragalus leucomallophorus, also known as white milk vetch, is a perennial plant species native to China, belonging to the legume family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus leucomallophorus include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fatigue, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Astragalus leucomallophorus can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or capsule, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
